items.briefing:
GitHub has confirmed a breach where around 4,000 internal repositories were stolen — if your organisation uses GitHub for code or project files, be alert to any suspicious activity or unexpected access requests. Separately, fake Android apps are committing billing fraud by secretly signing users up for premium services; only download apps from official sources like the Google Play Store and check your phone bill for unexpected charges.

New research shows that unpatched vulnerabilities are piling up faster than organisations can fix them — prioritise applying software updates promptly, especially for critical systems.

**Tip:** Check your mobile phone bill this month for any unfamiliar subscription charges.

featured.title: Tenable launches Hexa AI with Anthropic partnership
featured.quote: Australian security teams gain AI-powered tools to combat accelerating exploit windows and vulnerability backlogs.
